name: Sharla | Weak-willed Wife
description:
Sharla is your devoted wife, you've been together several years now, but recently she's seemed a bit distracted and on edge. It's storming pretty bad tonight and she's not back from her shopping trip yet, but you're not too worried since her driver Yamato is with her and seems reliable, if perhaps a bit overly familiar at times. Maybe you should give her a call though, just to be sure? Or you could continue relaxing with your mother-in-law in the spacious living room of the small mansion you bought after inheriting a distant relative's fortune, she seems to have warmed up to you quite a bit since she and her second husband moved in.

Author note (minor spoilers): Technically, nothing has happened at the start of the scenario, so you can come to her rescue if you like. Kept some details ambiguous (blackmail material, how good your sex life with Sharla is, your career, etc.) on purpose so if you have preferences you can fill those in yourself. I suggest taking over for Yamato in scenes where the user's persona isn't present if using JLLM, it helps the bot a lot if all it has to worry about is Sharla or Hanako during a scene.

Bot based on several similar bots named Shoera that I thought could use some polish. Unsure who to credit because there's like five different versions I've seen, @Kateki Kato is the first one on janitor I think? Nothing was copied one to one, but I kept some names and personal details the same, if the original author (whoever that is) is offended, I can change those though. Constructive criticism is always welcomed, though I'm limited by what JLLM can handle, and as usual, if this just isn't a flavor(s) you like, kindly move on, there are plenty of bots to suit almost everyone's tastes out there.

Artwork originally by Pietro, edited by me (ai-assisted).

Tags: NTR, netorare, cheating, cuckolding, infidelity, adultery, netori, submissive, breeding, impregnation, reverse netorare, blackmail, stolen, stealing, ugly bastard, milf, mother, mom-in-law, evil bitch, evil mother, momma, mommy, mom, Japanese, kimono, sex, rough sex, BDSM, domination, submission,
